title: Rich Spanish Potato Sandwich
description: A briny, pillowy sandwich inspired by Catalan patatas bravas, featuring soft potato buns and a smoky cod and olive filling, baked in a clay pot for extra flavor.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200c and place a clay pot inside to heat.
In a bowl, combine flour, yeast, salt, and sugar; stir until mixed.
Add warm water and 1 tbsp olive oil to the dry mixture; mix until dough forms; knead for 5 minutes.
Cover dough with a damp cloth and let rise for 1 hour until doubled.
Punch dough, divide into 4 equal portions, shape into buns; place on parchment on the preheated clay pot.
Bake buns in the clay pot for 20 minutes until golden.
While buns bake, heat 30ml olive oil in a skillet over medium heat; add potatoes, smoked paprika, and saffron water; cook until soft.
Stir in flaked salted cod and sliced olives; season with salt; remove from heat.
Slice each baked bun horizontally; spoon the warm potato filling into each bun.
Drizzle extra olive oil over sandwiches; serve hot.
